# Revio AI

> Revio AI is an AI lead-reactivation (database reactivation) platform. It scores a business's dead/cold leads 0–100, diagnoses why each lead went quiet (no follow-up, bad timing, price objection, chose competitor, unqualified), predicts the best re-contact window, and drafts personalized revival campaigns — with human approval before anything sends.

## What it does
- Dead Lead Score: deterministic 0–100 scoring (intent × engagement × objection type × time decay × sentiment × conversion probability) — computed in code, not guessed by an LLM
- Why-it-died diagnosis per lead, in plain language
- AI-drafted re-engagement messages, tuned to industry and cause of death
- Best-window timing (e.g. pricing-objection leads convert best ~28–35 days after going cold)
- Pipeline health monitoring, revenue-leak detection in dollars, daily executive report
- Six engines: Resurrection, Pipeline Monitor, Outreach (drafts, human-approved), Forensics & Coaching, Signals & Opportunity, Memory & Reporting

## Who it's for
SMB sales-led businesses with large lead databases they paid for and abandoned: real estate, solar, insurance, mortgage, home services, agencies.

## Pricing (USD/month)
- Starter $149 — up to 2,500 leads, scoring + diagnosis + email drafts
- Growth $399 — up to 15,000 leads, multi-channel, best-window timing
- Scale $899 — up to 75,000 leads, all engines, benchmarks
14-day trial, cancel anytime. Billing via Whop.

## Compliance
Consent tracking, suppression/opt-out honoring, human approval by default (CAN-SPAM / TCPA / GDPR aware). No auto-sending without explicit opt-in.

## Compare
https://revioai.site/compare — honest comparison vs Instantly, Apollo, lemlist, database-reactivation agencies, and hiring an SDR.
